sections.paragraph:
verb מסויד

be painted (wall)

verb לסייד (>>סיד)

to paint (wall) , whitewash

verb להסתיד (>>להסתייד)

calcify, become calcified; (Medicine) undergo sclerosis

masculine noun

lime, whitewash, calx, calcimine, distemper; plaster

masculine noun סיד (>>סייד)

whitewasher; plasterer
